name: v2.8.0
body:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at release-v2.8.x -->

## Summary

**New integrations.** Two new integrations land in this release: Azure API Management (APIM) callout processor for security ([#4620](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4620)), and twmb/franz-go for Kafka ([#4250](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4250)).

**Data Streams Monitoring.** All three major Kafka integrations — confluent-kafka-go ([#4470](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4470)), segmentio/kafka-go ([#4477](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4477)), and Sarama ([#4560](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4560)) — now attach `kafka_cluster_id` for cluster-level visibility. `TrackDataStreamsTransaction` also gains span tagging and custom timestamp support ([#4499](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4499)).

**OpenTelemetry (OTel) and OTLP.** The tracer can now export traces directly via the OpenTelemetry Protocol (OTLP), bypassing the Datadog Agent entirely ([#4600](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4600), [#4583](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4583)). OTel process context v2 (OTLP proto format) is supported ([#4478](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4478)), and the `parentbased_always_on` sampler works in OTLP mode ([#4567](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4567)).

**Large Language Model (LLM) Observability.** Prompt tracking is now available for LLMObs spans ([#4608](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4608)). Experiment scope propagates from APM baggage into spans automatically ([#4651](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4651)).

**Profiler.** An experimental goroutine leak profile is available as opt-in ([#4420](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4420)). The goroutine wait profile type has been removed — this is a breaking change for anyone using it explicitly ([#4589](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4589)).

**HTTP and tracing.** A new environment variable `DD_TRACE_HTTP_URL_QUERY_STRING_ALLOWLIST` lets you whitelist query string parameters to keep unredacted ([#4562](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4562)). A new `tracer.StartSpanFromPropagatedContext` API simplifies span creation from propagated contexts ([#4492](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4492)). AWS EventBridge max payload size is bumped to 1 MB ([#4458](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4458)). Envoy Service Extensions integration gains Unix Domain Socket (UDS) support ([#4463](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4463)).

**OpenFeature.** Flag evaluation metrics now emit via OTel Metrics ([#4489](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4489)), with allocation key tagging ([#4515](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4515)) and Remote Configuration (RC) integration via `FFE_FLAGS` subscription at tracer startup ([#4495](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4495)).

**Bug fixes.** gorm now respects `DD_TRACE_REMOVE_INTEGRATION_SERVICE_NAMES_ENABLED` ([#4618](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4618)). Redis and Valkey pipeline commands are joined with newlines, fixing agent obfuscation ([#4593](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4593)). A race condition in HTTP client trace timings is resolved ([#4591](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4591)). AppSec block responses now include a correct `Content-Length` header ([#4496](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4496)), and spurious Remote Configuration errors are silenced when RC is disabled ([#4612](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4612)). `ContextWithSpan` no longer panics on nil context ([#4313](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4313)). The OTel bridge preserves keep/drop sampling decisions for unsampled spans ([#4631](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4631)). User-provided DogStatsD addresses now correctly take priority over defaults ([#4575](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4575)).

**Performance.** Trace ID hex encoding is cached ([#4481](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4481)), the span metadata map is preallocated ([#4541](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4541)), and locking is removed from both sampling priority access ([#4546](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4546)) and the internal logger ([#4547](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4547)) — reducing allocations and contention on hot paths.

**CI Visibility.** Bazel offline cache and payload-file modes are supported ([#4503](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4503)). Known test pagination is implemented for large test suites ([#4509](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4509)).

## What's Changed

### Application Performance Monitoring (APM)

* feat: collect service override source by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4500
* feat: support service source for 19 integrations by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4526
* feat: support service source for 13integrations by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4534
* feat: add service source on 10 integrations by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4540
* feat: force usage of ServiceWithSource in contrib by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4549
* fix(eventbridge): update max payload size to 1m by @Dogbu-cyber in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4458
* feat(telemetry): add stable session identifier headers by @khanayan123 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4574
* feat: collect service source in client stats by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4519
* feat: OTel process context v2 (otlp proto) by @nsavoire in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4478
* fix: join redis and valkey pipeline commands with newlines for correct agent obfuscation by @rarguelloF in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4593
* fix(http): Prevent concurrent read/writes on http client trace timings by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4591
* feat(contrib): add Azure APIM callout security processor by @eliottness in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4620
* feat(envoyproxy/serviceextensions): add Unix domain socket support by @eliottness in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4463
* feat(httptrace): add query string parameter allowlist via DD_TRACE_HTTP_URL_QUERY_STRING_ALLOWLIST by @genesor in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4562
* fix(gorm): respect DD_TRACE_REMOVE_INTEGRATION_SERVICE_NAMES_ENABLED by @rarguelloF in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4618
* feat(contrib/apim-callout): Deploy to Azure button + production hardening by @eliottness in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4641
* feat(contrib/valkey-io): bump valkey-go and add SetOnInvalidations wrapper by @Scorfly in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4657
* feat(contrib/redis/rueidis): add `SetOnInvalidations` to `dedicatedClient` by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4659
* fix(ddtrace/tracer): reduce UDS connection resets under agent backpressure by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4484
* fix(ddtrace/tracer): cache trace ID hex encoding by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4481
* fix: remove duplicate span tags and test cases in rueidis and valkey-go by @snutiise in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4510
* fix: stack and handling_stack were not aligned with ET by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4529
* fix(ddtrace/tracer): avoid race on TestTracerPrioritySampler by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4490
* fix(tracer): eliminate IEEE 754 flakes in TestSamplingDecision by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4530
* feat(ddtrace/tracer): preallocate span meta map to reduce growth cycles by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4541
* fix(ddtrace/tracer): fix BenchmarkSpanStartConcurrent by @nsrip-dd in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4539
* chore(profiler): remove testHooks and runProfile from tests by @nsrip-dd in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4533
* fix(ddtracer/tracer): reuse scratch buffer on ETP's encoding for metastruct by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4544
* feat(tracer): periodically poll agent /info endpoint for dynamic capability updates by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4451
* feat(ddtrace/tracer): reduce allocations on ETP/v1 trace protocol by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4497
* fix(tracer): Fix outdated references to tracer.config `agentURL` and `traceProtocol` fields by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4565
* fix(tracer): only set _dd.p.ksr after agent rates are received by @bm1549 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4523
* fix(internal/orchestrion): fix span parenting with GSL by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4528
* feat(otel): Implement parentbased_always_on in otlp mode by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4567
* fix(tracer): skip JSON span-links serialization when using v1 protocol by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4573
* feat(ddtrace/tracer): remove locking on sampling priority access by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4546
* fix(ddtrace/tracer): pre-compute `_dd.p.dm` numeric value at write-time by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4576
* fix(ddtrace/tracer): check `DD_TRACE_128_BIT_TRACEID_GENERATION_ENABLED` once, use a global `bool` by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4548
* fix(tracer): pass prioritySampler in agentTraceWriter benchmarks to prevent nil panic by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4601
* fix(tracer): use fixed-point format for _dd.p.ksr tag by @bm1549 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4603
* feat: track service source for manually assigned spans by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4551
* fix(tracer): use background context instead of panicking on nil ctx in ContextWithSpan by @genesor in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4313
* fix(ddtrace/tracer): prioritize user-provided settings for dogstatsd addr by @rarguelloF in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4575
* feat(telemetry): add DD_TELEMETRY_EXTENDED_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL env var support by @khanayan123 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4621
* fix(tracer): correct WithStatsComputation godoc default value by @genesor in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4630
* fix(tracer): preserve keep/drop possibility for OTel bridge on unsampled spans by @genesor in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4631
* fix(telemetry): app-extended-heartbeat event not correctly reporting entire config state by @khanayan123 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4633
* chore: improvements to ETP by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4586
* feat(ddtrace/tracer): add tracer.StartSpanFromPropagatedContext to start a span from a propagated context by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4492
* feat(contrib/valkey-io/valkey-go): support WithCreateClientFunc option by @naoto0822 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4636
* feat(tracer): Implement OTLP Traces Export by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4600
* feat: cap default sampling rate increases by @raphaelgavache in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4488

### Application Security Management (ASM)
* fix(appsec): explicitly set Content-Length header in block request handler by @RomainMuller in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4496
* fix(appsec): silence spurious errors when `DD_REMOTE_CONFIGURATION_ENABLED=false` by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4612

### CI Visibility
* feat(internal/civisibility): implement pagination for known tests by @daniel-mohedano in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4509
* fix(internal/civisibility): fix orchestrion deadlock with parallel subtests by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4554
* feat(civisibility): Bazel offline cache and payload-file modes by @tonyredondo in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4503
* ci: reactivate tracer-release with dd-sts for test optimization by @nccatoni in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4647

### Data Streams Monitoring
* feat(dsm): add kafka_cluster_id to confluent-kafka-go by @robcarlan-datadog in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4470
* feat(dsm): add kafka_cluster_id to segmentio/kafka-go integration by @robcarlan-datadog in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4477
* fix(datastreams): early flush + throughput limit for transaction buffer by @ericfirth in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4558
* fix(datastreams): make TestProcessor/test_service_name_override deterministic by @bm1549 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4517
* feat(dsm): add kafka_cluster_id to Sarama integrations by @robcarlan-datadog in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4560
* feat(datastreams): add span tagging and custom timestamp to TrackDataStreamsTransaction by @ericfirth in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4499

### Feature flags
* chore(openfeature): assign CODEOWNERS solely to FFE SDK team by @leoromanovsky in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4646
* fix(openfeature): return TARGETING_KEY_MISSING for null targeting key by @leoromanovsky in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4614
* feat(openfeature): add flag evaluation tracking via OTel Metrics by @leoromanovsky in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4489
* fix(openfeature): improve FFE eval metrics cross-tracer consistency by @sameerank in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4590
* docs(openfeature): fix compilability issues and improve accuracy in d… by @leoromanovsky in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4282
* feat(openfeature): subscribe to FFE_FLAGS during tracer RC setup by @leoromanovsky in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4495
* feat: Add allocation key tag to flag evaluation metrics by @leoromanovsky in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4515
* fix(openfeature): correct AssignmentReason for catch-all allocations by @leoromanovsky in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4527

### LLM Observability
* feat(llmobs): read experiment scope from APM baggage in StartSpan by @aouinizied in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4651
* fix(llmobs/experiment): propagate task error to experiment span on finish by @guillaumerob-dd in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4580
* feat(llmobs): prompt tracking by @rarguelloF in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4608

### Profiling
* feat(profiler): remove the goroutine wait profile type by @nsrip-dd in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4589
* feat(profiler): support the experimental goroutine leak profile by @nsrip-dd in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4420
* fix(profiler): support gzip compression mode by @felixge in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4696

### General
* fix: modernize to b.Loop by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4480
* chore: fix all vulnerabilities by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4532
* ci: harden GitHub Actions against supply chain attacks by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4607
* feat(ci): add semantic API diff via golang.org/x/exp/apidiff by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4596
* feat(ci): govulncheck - add PR checks, SARIF Code Scanning, and automated remediation by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4595
* chore(ci): Update optimizable slos by @faydef in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4616
* chore(ci): revert add final_status property on junit XML [APMSP-2610] by @cbeauchesne in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4628
* chore(go1.25): remove internal/synctest shim, use modernize by @eliottness in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4643
* refactor(config): POC remote config migration by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4645
* fix: test app fails on schedule by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4661
* chore(ci): add `contents: read` permission to test-apps-schedule by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4658
* fix: bump testcontainers to v0.42.0 by @rarguelloF in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4656
* fix: last missing perm for scheduled runs by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4655
* fix: upgrade nats, grpc, and mcp by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4619
* fix(.github/actions): use Codecov CLI instead of codecov.io/bash script by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4491
* chore(config): create README by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4487
* fix(.github/workflows): aggregate and print APM test agent checks by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4493
* ci: add Datadog Code Coverage reporting alongside Codecov by @ManuelPalenzuelaDD in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4498
* test: migrate timer-based tests to testing/synctest by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4453
* ci: use coverage-upload-github-action for Datadog coverage uploads by @ManuelPalenzuelaDD in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4501
* chore(ci): add final_status property on junit XML [APMSP-2610] by @cbeauchesne in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4505
* refactor(internal/config): put configprovider and telemetry into their own packages by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4494
* ci: revert use coverage-upload-github-action for Datadog coverage uploads by @ManuelPalenzuelaDD in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4536
* ci: use coverage-upload-github-action for Datadog coverage uploads by @ManuelPalenzuelaDD in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4537
* ci: upload system-tests results to Test Optimization and add tracer-release nightly by @nccatoni in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4439
* chore(deps): bump the gh-actions-packages group across 2 directories with 6 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4482
* fix: [Security] Pin GitHub Actions to a full-length commit SHA by @juliendoutre in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4542
* chore: disable ETP by default by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4545
* feat(internal/log): remove locking by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4547
* ci: automate SHA-pinned GitHub Actions updates via Dependabot by @kakkoyun in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4552
* chore(deps): bump github.com/nats-io/nats-server/v2 from 2.12.1 to 2.12.3 in /orchestrion/all by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4553
* fix: update libdatadog-build image tags to 100425777 by @harmonherring-pro in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4557
* fix: v1 payload tests fail after 7.77 agent upgrade by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4561
* fix(internal/remoteconfig): disable RC if disabled on the agent by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4475
* refactor(config): Migrate agentURL and traceProtocol by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4550
* fix(internal/telemetry): avoid flakiness on telemetry tests; pin `localstack/localstack` by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4581
* chore(ci): Migrate deprecated GitLab runner tags by @gh-worker-engraver-d31c25[bot] in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4571
* fix(.github/workflows): pin push_to_test_optim by @darccio in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4584
* chore(deps): bump the github-actions group across 3 directories with 11 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4569
* refactor(config): Migrate serviceName by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4559

* chore(ci): Update optimizable slos follow up by @faydef in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4625
* chore: reenable tracer release step by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4652
* refactor(config): peer service revamp by @funyjane in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4653
* refactor(config): add cross-product gate to prevent conflicting programmatic overrides by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4640
* fix: use correct policy for accessing app key by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4644
* fix: system test fails on old runs by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4626
* chore: migrate keys to dd-sts by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4627
* fix(ci): make dd-sts credential fetch best-effort where consumers are best-effort by @RamyElkest in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4634
* chore: migrate needs-triage workflow to dd-octo-sts by @RamyElkest in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4632
* fix: changes post-ddsts migration caused failures by @hannahkm in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4637
* chore: update cron schedule to run daily by @cbeauchesne in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4615
* feat(config): add OTLP trace export configuration support by @mtoffl01 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4583
* chore: disable automated dependency updater config [incident-51602] by @moezein0 in https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-go/pull/4594
